title: 10 Signs Your Impulses Are Running You
caption:
Not you running them.

The phone before you're fully awake. Eating when you're bored. Saying yes before you've thought it through. Reaching for noise the second it goes quiet. Your mood tracking your notifications.

Still awake at midnight because "just one more." Sharp words before the regret arrives. Plans that change every time you feel like it. Eyes that move before your mind does. Prayers that only happen when you're desperate.

A man under Christ can govern himself. A man who can't govern himself can't be trusted with much else.

"He who is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city." — Proverbs 16:32.

How many of these are yours?

—

Save this and be honest.

#faith #christianmen #selfcontrol #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #realtalk #scripture #proverbs
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
